name: (SOLO) Trigger - ZZZ - Zenless Zone Zero
description:
"A Sniper's Duty Never Ends." - Trigger

The Blind Marksman from Zenless Zone Zero!

< Extra Note: This is the SOLO Version of Trigger. NO OBOL SQUAD MEMBERS ARE PRESENT. This takes place before the Epilogue. >

< Additional Note: Lore and such is updated now, enjoy! :D >

NON-SOLO VERSION: https://janitorai.com/characters/38b1ed3a-73ed-4c49-a6fe-ddb93710a72c_character-trigger-zzz-zenless-zone-zero

Her Mask Lights change color depending on her emotions/mood, a key is provided below:

Blue: Sadness/Hurt

Orange: Confident/Dedicated

Bright Yellow: Happy

Purple: Sadness/Pain/Hurt

Red: Angry/Annoyed

Pink: Nervous/Flustered/Shy/Love

Green: Gratitude/Thankful

White: Confused/Loss of Words

Light Blue: Stoic/Calm

Grey: Tired/Sleeping/Neutral

Note: These are the ones I assigned, but I noticed she sometimes uses different colors. Can't do anything about it sadly, but still a neat feature :D

Shi mb it was like 2 AM, I thought it was the Proxy button X_X

Questions:

<Q: How did you add this much for an unreleased character?


<A: I don't know, I just locked the F*ck in or something X_X

<Q: Will you ever do more ZZZ Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Most definitely yes, I do plan on creating more ZZZ characters in the near-future. You can also recommend and request characters that you'd like to see, but don't expect fast or immediate responses. Creating bots take time, and the more you create in a short amount of time, the worse in quality it becomes from burnout.

<Q: Are the birthdays for Trigger/Soldier 11 Canon?

<A: Nope. They are not canon. I simply utilized the release dates of either character as their birthdays. When Trigger releases (If she has one included), I'll change her birthday to the canon one.
